description_long: This nightstand features a classic, vintage-inspired design with elegantly curved cabriole legs and a two-tone finish. The upper section includes a dark wood top and a set of five small drawers, three of which are centrally aligned and two on either side, with a small open shelf in the middle. The lower section has a larger writing surface that can be pulled out, and the front apron is adorned with a subtle carved motif. The back panel is plain and finished in a matching wood tone, while the sides reveal the stepped profile of the writing surface and upper compartments. The handles on the drawers are small, round knobs, and the overall construction appears to be primarily wood, with a smooth, matte finish.
description: A vintage-style nightstand with curved legs, multiple small drawers, and a pull-out writing surface, finished in two-tone wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing five small drawers, a central open shelf, and a pull-out writing surface with decorative apron.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped profile of the writing surface and upper compartments, with curved legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back panel and the full curvature of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the stepped profile and leg design seen in view 1.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall, beside a bed or seating area
